real case: paper-webpage-builder

Git shows lines. sit shows Skill risk.

When an agent edits prompts, schemas, scripts, and tests, sit turns the diff into an auditable Skill review.

Plain Git diff
- "modules": ["Hero"]
+ "modules": ["Hero", "Quality Checks"]
+ "keywords": ["paper webpage"]

+13 -2 lines
Reviewer still asks:
what changed semantically?
sit semantic review
schemaoutput property added: keywords optional
golden3 expected outputs changed and still pass
riskreview-required, suggested bump: minor
reviewready-to-paste PR summary with reproduce commands
For AI Skill packages: prompts + schemas + tests + scripts + release artifacts. pip install sit-toolkit

One real Skill PR, reduced to review signals

0.2.0 -> 0.3.0
passvalidation
3/3golden tests
minorversion bump
reviewrisk level
Agent editsSkill behavior changes
sit diffClassifies semantic impact
sit testChecks golden outputs
sit reviewWrites PR guidance
sit releaseBundles reproducibly

Complex PRs stay readable

promptdesign principles +55 lines, table handling rules
scriptdesign drift checker adds CLI and functions
scriptlink checker adds external URL mode
refmodule patterns explain evidence hierarchy

A Skill is more than a prompt

SKILL.mdoperating instructions
schemamachine-readable contract
goldenbehavior regression tests
scriptsvalidation and asset tooling
reportsrelease and PR audit trail
